meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve No Portfolio (Advanced)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no portfolio. Learn to leverage Git with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to build high-value SaaS assets in record time.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a velocity issue, not a talent one. By integrating Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for iterative deployment, you can generate production-grade micro-SaaS assets in hours. Stop waiting for clients; build high-impact, functional proofs-of-concept that demonstrate technical mastery and immediate business value to prospects.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the vision for a SaaS product, but the market demands proof—a portfolio that shows you can ship, iterate, and solve real-world problems. Without it, you are just another founder with an idea; with it, you are an engineer with a business.

We are moving beyond basic coding. By orchestrating Git workflows with AI-native tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you turn your repository into an autonomous development engine. This isn't just about writing code; it's about weaponizing your commit history to prove your technical authority to future stakeholders.

steps.title: Architecting the MVP Foundation
steps.description: Define the scope of a high-value tool that solves a specific niche pain point. Use Antigravity to generate the directory structure and core business logic before a single line of code is written.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a CTO. Generate a clean, production-ready directory structure for a SaaS MVP that solves [Insert Niche Problem]. Include a README with a clear value proposition and a tech stack recommendation using Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind.

steps.title: Automating Git Commit Hygiene
steps.description: AI-generated code is only useful if it's readable. Use Claude Code to enforce semantic commits, ensuring your portfolio history tells a story of iterative improvement.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pre-commit hook script that enforces Conventional Commits standard. Ensure the linter runs before any commit is finalized.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx husky install && npx husky add .husky/pre-commit "npm run lint"'

steps.title: Rapid Feature Implementation
steps.description: Accelerate development by translating business requirements directly into functional components. This demonstrates your ability to bridge the gap between market need and technical execution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust, responsive authentication component using Supabase Auth. Include error handling and loading states. Ensure it follows security best practices.

steps.title: Documentation as a Marketing Asset
steps.description: Your code is worthless if it's not documented for users and investors. Use AI to auto-generate technical documentation that highlights your architectural decisions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a technical design document based on the current codebase. Highlight why I chose this specific stack and how the data flow works for the end user.

steps.title: Deployment and Portfolio Showcase
steps.description: Push your code to production and link it to your profile. A live link is the ultimate portfolio piece that proves you can deploy at scale.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a deployment checklist for a Next.js app on Vercel. Include steps for environment variables, domain configuration, and performance optimization.

pro_tips: Treat your GitHub 'Contribution Graph' as a vanity metric for stakeholders; focus on the 'Pull Request' history to demonstrate your logic.
Use Claude Code to refactor your own code periodically; it shows you prioritize technical debt reduction over reckless shipping.
Always include a 'Lessons Learned' section in your README; it demonstrates high-level engineering maturity.
Automate your testing suite using AI; a project with 80%+ test coverage is 10x more impressive to a CTO than a feature-rich app with zero tests.
Build 'Micro-SaaS' modules that can be reused; you aren't just building a portfolio, you're building a library of proprietary assets.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, treat the next one as a 'v2' iteration. Add a subscription payment gateway using Stripe and document the integration process to showcase your ability to handle financial logic.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to turn code into a career-defining asset. Stop worrying about your lack of history and start building your future. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
